title: Binchotan Grilled Pork Chops
description: A simple yet flavorful dish showcasing the smoky flavor of binchotan charcoal paired with the rich taste of pork.
instructions: Season both sides of the pork chops with salt.
Grill the pork chops for 5-6 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
While the pork chops are cooking, light the binchotan charcoal and let it burn for 10-15 minutes to produce a smoky heat.
Once the pork chops are cooked, place them on a plate and brush with fatty (olive oil).
Let the pork chops rest for 5 minutes before serving.
